subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast inhaled the fragrance of divine knowledge! At this hour when a company of friends are present and observing this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استنشق رائحه العرفان در این ساعت که جمعی از دوستان حاضر و ناظر این عبد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
